rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component type or implementation annexes
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference ports or features
Implementation-level bindings and assignments should be placed in component implementation annexes
Do not encode AADL properties directly as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
Avoid Boolean domain comparisons unless the port is explicitly an AGREE bool in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use proper variable declarations
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component features or ports in scope
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their automatic exposure in AGREE scope
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
